title: coryphopteris borealis
intro: Coryphopteris borealis, also known as the Northern club fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. It is native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia and has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Coryphopteris borealis include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and alleviate digestive problems. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
